title: Number Of Substrings
description: Write a python function to count number of non-empty substrings of a given string.

source.paper: Austin, J., Odena, A., Nye, M., Bosma, M., Michalewski, H., Dohan, D., Jiang, E., Cai, C., Terry, M., Le, Q., & Sutton, C. (2021). Program Synthesis with Large Language Models. arXiv:2108.07732
